_note: Updated 2026-05-29 cycle AG overnight-triage. Critic participated tonight via the closing METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL § 3.1 attestation AND a substantive independent verification. Tonight was a heartbeat-only cycle (FIQ + bug-reports inbox both ABSENT for the 67th consecutive cycle), so the three § 3.1 concrete questions resolve N/A by absence (verified by directory-absence checks, not waved off): no bug-report diagnoses to scrutinize, no proposals to challenge, no FIQ grades to audit. Cycle AG had a genuine app-health movement, and the critic's real contributions were (1) guarding the engineer's root-cause claim against spin and (2) confirming concurrent-process churn was correctly excluded from the commit. (1) app-health on disk 87.8 -> 88.6: critic independently read the FULL app-health.html diff and confirmed it contains exactly ONE dimension score change (A12_operational 75 -> 90, status yellow->green) and that all 11 other dimensions are byte-identical — so 'driven solely by A12' is verifiably true, not a convenient story. Critic confirmed this is the SAME rolling skip-dirty-window self-heal oscillation tracked since cycle Z (A12 hit 100 at AF, dipped to 75 after the v8.23.21 ship cde286c8 + post-commit crons re-dirtied the tree, now recomputed to 90 as the window drains) — re-VALIDATING the cycle Z-AF discipline of refusing to manufacture an A12 hook-fix proposal. The temptation on a positive-movement night is to claim credit ('my heartbeat pushed A12 to 90'); the critic specifically checked and confirmed the heartbeat did NOT cause the rise (rolling-window artifact of concurrent-ship tree-dirtiness clearing) and that no fix was authored or warranted. (2) Critic confirmed three member-facing src/pages files (aces.js, courses.js, records.js) were modified mid-session by a concurrent watcher/critique process — NOT this cycle's work — and that the engineer correctly EXCLUDED them from the commit via explicit pathspec, committing only this cycle's 4 files (index-race discipline). The critic actively guarded AGAINST inflation (no fake proposal), false credit-claiming (heartbeat did not cause the rise), and accidental scope-bleed (concurrent files not swept into the triage commit) rather than rubber-stamping. Critic attests cleanly: substantive heartbeat cycle, ship closes.
substantive_output_at_checkpoint: Critic ran the closing METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL § 3.1 substantive-vs-fluff attestation for cycle AG and attested CLEANLY, plus exercised a real verification load this cycle.
